languages.text: "Мне хотелось бы получить их совет и помощь с оборудованием в Секторе Бионика".
"I seek their counsel and assistance with the equipment in the Sector Bionica."
languages.original_text: "Мне хотелось бы получить их совет и помощь с оборудованием в Секторе Бионика".

traits.locale_text: "I seek their counsel and assistance with the equipment in the Sector Bionica."
"I seek their counsel and assistance with the equipment in the Sector Bionica."
"I seek their counsel and assistance with the equipment in the Sector Bionica."
"I seek their counsel and assistance with the equipment in the Sector Bionica."

languages.text: "Ich brauche ihren Rat und ihre Hilfe mit dem Equipment im Sektor Bionica."
languages.original_text: "I seek their counsel and assistance with the equipment in the Sector Bionica."

traits.locale_text: "Ich brauche ihren Rat und ihre Hilfe mit dem Equipment im Sektor Bionica."

languages.text: « Je recherche conseil et assistance au sujet du fauteuil du secteur Bionica. »
languages.original_text: "I seek their counsel and assistance with the equipment in the Sector Bionica."

traits.locale_text: « Je recherche conseil et assistance au sujet du fauteuil du secteur Bionica. »

languages.text: “我想请他们为仿生区的设备提供建议与援助。”
languages.original_text: "I seek their counsel and assistance with the equipment in the Sector Bionica."

traits.locale_text: “我想请他们为仿生区的设备提供建议与援助。”

languages.text: «Busco su consejo y ayuda con respecto al equipo del Sector Bionica».
languages.original_text: "I seek their counsel and assistance with the equipment in the Sector Bionica."

traits.locale_text: «Busco su consejo y ayuda con respecto al equipo del Sector Bionica».

languages.text: 「バイオニクス部門の設備について、彼らのアドバイスと助けが欲しい。」
languages.original_text: "I seek their counsel and assistance with the equipment in the Sector Bionica."

traits.locale_text: 「バイオニクス部門の設備について、彼らのアドバイスと助けが欲しい。」

languages.text: "Sektör Biyonika'daki ekipmanlar konusunda danışmanlıklarını ve yardımlarını istiyorum."
languages.original_text: "I seek their counsel and assistance with the equipment in the Sector Bionica."

traits.locale_text: "Sektör Biyonika'daki ekipmanlar konusunda danışmanlıklarını ve yardımlarını istiyorum."
